calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltfs' To Comply W/ A Ntc Of Vehicle Inspection; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT JUDITH GUERRERO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's To Comply With A Notice Of Vehicle Inspection; Request For Monetary Sanctions as follows: It appears that no opposition has been filed to DEFENDANT JUDITH GUERRERO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's To Comply With A Notice Of Vehicle Inspection. Accordingly, it is granted. The Court imposed monetary sanctions against plaintiffs in the amount of $520.00 which shall be paid to defendant and her attorneys within thirty (30) days from the date of this order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
